name: deleteMessages
description: Use this method to delete multiple messages simultaneously. If some of the specified messages can't be found, they are skipped

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username

parameters.name: message_ids
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of 1-100 identifiers of messages to delete. See deleteMessage for limitations on which messages can be deleted.
